description: AbuChip color tokens. Single accent (cobalt) on neutral ink + paper. Amber appears only as the second series in two-series charts.

amber._usage: Charts only. Reserved for the second series in two-series visualizations.

semantic._usage: Reserved for status indicators. Do not use as decorative color.

chart._usage: sequential = monochrome cobalt ramp for ordered/quantitative data. twoSeries = the only acceptable bichromatic chart pairing.

gradients._usage: The single approved gradient. Used only on landing-page hero blocks. No gradients elsewhere.
